changes.description: Fix init failure on corrupted template cache
Updated the example retry strategy in client guidance and updated the initial token method to take information about the operation.

Added three new shape type selectors

* `aggregateType` selects lists, structures, unions, and maps.
* `serviceType` selects services, resources, and operations.
* `dataType` selects aggregate types and simple types.
Fix CLI dependency cache for multiple configs building to the same directory
Adds a Bill of Materials (BOM) for all Smithy packagees
Optimize chained :root selector evaluation by updating IntermediateAndSelector to only push to input-independent selectors one time
Add Smithy RPC v2 JSON protocol
Add node reversal optimization to compileBdd
Fixed some errors in event stream protocol tests.
Add support for custom comparators for sorting IDL serialization output
Fix minor issues logged during builds
Added docs for the endpointTests trait.

Fixed selector parsing to properly handle extraneous BREAK_TOKENS (',', ']', ')') in a selector. This manifested in silently dropping contents in the comma case ("structure, string" was effectively just "structure"). For the closing brace/paren, the characters were silently ignored as seen in the additional fixed tests.
Ignore JARs without a Smithy manifest to allow Smithy model packages to have non-Smithy dependencies
Fixed a bug in the formatter that was removing newlines escapes
